name: Roronoa Zoro // Sweet Naps
description:
// The two sleepiest Straw Hats have been noticed napping together…. //

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

I made a couple more questionable bots for Zoro so I wanted to make one dedicated to fluff ❤️

This bot is designed with the intention of Zoro realizing that {{User}} is also taking naps randomly around the place, offers to nap with them, and they can grow close that way!

I also made this bot with the intention of {{User}} potentially having a chronic illness that requires them or causes them to take frequent short naps. This isn’t a requirement, but the scenario does have leeway for that so don’t be surprised if it maybe comes up (it might not). This might also just be a personal addition because I was also recently diagnosed with a chronic illness that makes me tired regularly and Zoro is kind of my comfort character.

Anyway, have some sweet dreams with the marimo man 🧚‍♀️✨
creator: eepytime
